Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user has provided a detailed DECLARE model for a loan application process and wants me to 1 Describe the underlying loan approval process in practical terms 2 Explain step by step from initial application to final disbursement 3 Discuss how each constraint ensures compliance and logical order 4 Consider real world motivations regulatory compliance fraud prevention etc 5 Speculate on consequences of out of order activities or omitted steps

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me break down the DECLARE model constraints Existence constraints Receive Application must exist Gather Additional Documents must exist Absence constraint Proceed Without Compliance must NOT exist Exactly one constraint Preliminary Credit Check must occur exactly once Init constraint Receive Application must be the first activity Responded existence Assemble Loan Offer Package must be followed by Quality Assurance Review Coexistence Gather Additional Documents and Authorize Contract Terms must both occur if one occurs the other must too Response Receive Application must be followed by Preliminary Credit Check Precedence Quality Assurance Review must occur before Authorize Contract Terms Succession Preliminary Credit Check must be followed by Gather Additional Documents Altresponse Transfer Funds must be followed by Notify Customer alternative response Altprecedence Notify Customer must occur before Transfer Funds alternative precedence Altsuccession Gather Additional Documents must be followed by Quality Assurance Review alternative succession Chainresponse Assemble Loan Offer Package must be immediately followed by Transfer Funds Chainprecedence Authorize Contract Terms must immediately precede Preliminary Credit Check Chainsuccession Quality Assurance Review must immediately precede Assemble Loan Offer Package Noncoexistence Transfer Funds and Receive Application cannot both occur Nonsuccession Notify Customer cannot be immediately followed by Preliminary Credit Check Nonchainsuccession Authorize Contract Terms cannot immediately precede Notify Customer

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I notice some constraints seem contradictory or may need careful interpretation Let me work through this systematically

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: The key activities in order would be 1 Receive Application init 2 Preliminary Credit Check response to Receive Application exactly one 3 Gather Additional Documents succession from Preliminary Credit Check 4 Quality Assurance Review altsuccession from Gather Additional Documents precedence before Authorize Contract Terms 5 Assemble Loan Offer Package chainsuccession from Quality Assurance Review 6 Authorize Contract Terms precedence from Quality Assurance Review coexistence with Gather Additional Documents 7 Transfer Funds chainresponse from Assemble Loan Offer Package 8 Notify Customer altresponse from Transfer Funds altprecedence before Transfer Funds

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Wait theres an issue altprecedence says Notify Customer must occur before Transfer Funds but altresponse says Transfer Funds must be followed by Notify Customer Thats contradictory unless they can happen in either order

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Let me re examine altresponse Transfer Funds Notify Customer Transfer Funds responds to Notify Customer or vice versa altprecedence Notify Customer Transfer Funds Notify Customer precedes Transfer Funds

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: These seem to indicate that either order is acceptable they must happen but in no particular order alternative precedence response

Name: Deductive Reasoning - NE
Text: Actually looking more carefully altresponse means either Transfer Funds responds to Notify Customer OR Notify Customer responds to Transfer Funds altprecedence means either Notify Customer precedes Transfer Funds OR Transfer Funds precedes Notify Customer So they just need to co occur with the constraint that one precedes or responds to the other
